title: Tick Control in Bedford (Westchester, NYC) | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Bedford, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Prices from $125 – $325. Same-day service available.
intro: Bedford's scenic wooded properties and expansive lawns create ideal habitats for ticks, putting families and pets at risk for Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Bedford, targeting tick populations before they become a health hazard. Our proven treatments protect your outdoor spaces so you can enjoy your property worry-free.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Bedford's unique landscape of historic estates and wooded properties, Best Pest Control NYC understands the specific tick pressures facing Westchester residents. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages.
localContext: Bedford's combination of stone walls, wooded trails, and manicured lawns around properties near Bedford Village and along historic routes creates perfect conditions for deer ticks and dog ticks. From estates near the Bedford Oak to homes along the Mianus River Gorge area, our team knows the local terrain and customizes treatments to protect your specific property.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Bedford?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Bedford typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, adult deer ticks can be active during warmer winter days, so year-round vigilance is important in Westchester County.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Bedford?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Bedford range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and the extent of treatment needed. We offer seasonal packages that provide the most cost-effective protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and allowing the treatment to dry (typically 2-3 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities.

faqs.question: How often should I have my Bedford property treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend treating your Bedford property every 4-6 weeks during tick season (April-November). Our seasonal maintenance programs ensure continuous protection and significantly reduce tick populations throughout the year.
